title: Missing authorization on OpenAI Assistants Vector Store CRUD routes
description: In Flowise <= 3.1.1, every route in packages/server/src/routes/openai-assistants-vector-store/index.ts (create, read, list, update, delete, file upload, file delete) is registered with no permission-check middleware. The router relies only on the global /api/v1 authentication, so any authenticated user or API-key holder, regardless of assigned RBAC role, can create, modify, delete vector stores and upload or remove files. Comparable sensitive routes in the same codebase gate operations with checkPermission()/checkAnyPermission(), but those gates are absent here.
